purpose: Machine-readable execution grammar for Kenn PPT Deck Studio. Use this after a style id is selected and before any visual sample or production deck is shown.

requiredSampleContract.hardRule: Gate 1B samples must be validated against this grammar before asking the user to approve style.

globalExecutionRules.componentSource: Use the chosen template component library first. New components must be registered in the sample manifest or profile-specific component grammar; do not invent one-off UI blocks.
globalExecutionRules.layoutSource: Every slide uses a named layout id from the template, grammar profile, or a documented derived layout. Avoid anonymous flex/card pages.
globalExecutionRules.colorSource: Map palette tokens to CSS variables at the root. After root tokens are set, slide CSS should use var(...) tokens rather than hardcoded colors.
globalExecutionRules.shapeSource: Shapes are style-specific. Number badges, dots, pills, cards, tabs, panels, gauges, and diagrams must match the profile shape grammar.
globalExecutionRules.typeSource: Use the profile title/body/mono roles and Windows-safe fallbacks. Do not switch serif/sans temperament because a title 'looks premium'.
globalExecutionRules.motionSource: Motion recipes must describe the slide's semantic reveal. Keep B low-power/static mode.
globalExecutionRules.failFast: If the sample violates a forbidden shape, forbidden chart type, font role, or component role, fix it before showing it.

course-canvas.rule: For teaching/courseware, start from Course Canvas slide layouts or .cc/.ccc component classes. Derived styles may remap tokens, but cannot replace the component library with anonymous cards.

investor-signal.rule: Use signal/KPI/evidence primitives and keep the investor dark/light rhythm. Avoid classroom cards.

academy-prospectus.rule: Use prospectus brochure components, outcome stats, institutional surfaces, and restrained education proof motifs.

proof-atlas.rule: Use atlas evidence cells, ledgers, coordinates, source notes, risk markers, and dossier grids. Avoid unsupported decorative charts.

launch-theatre.rule: Use stage/keynote reveal components and cinematic motion. Avoid dense classroom text blocks.

guizang-base.rule: Use Guizang's registered magazine or Swiss layout language. Do not mix both modes in one deck.

componentGrammar.numbering: Rectangular module numbers, rail tabs, engineering callout ids. No floating circular badges.
componentGrammar.panels: White or warm-paper technical blocks with rule headers; dark panels only for terminal/instrument inserts.
componentGrammar.cards: 2-4 annotated blocks, no nested cards, no SaaS card soup.
componentGrammar.badges: Mono rectangular labels with measurement/ticket feeling.
componentGrammar.icons: Line icons only when they explain function; no emoji or decorative stickers.

typeLock.title: Aptos/Segoe UI/Microsoft YaHei, strong but not theatrical
typeLock.mono: Cascadia Mono or Consolas for labels

layoutGrammar.safeZones: Keep main title out of right-side technical inserts; reserve 64px min outer margin.

gridDiscipline.overlay: same-box overlay or equivalent debug hook when layout is grid-led
gridDiscipline.placement: major title/content/diagram bands declare grid spans; exceptions require component role

graphicGrammar.diagram: Use rulers, arrows, labels, and modules that look useful.

technical-manual.motionGrammar: Ruler draw, module lock-in, measurement reveal; no bounce.

componentGrammar.numbering: Small mono stage markers or timeline ticks; no numbered classroom circles.
componentGrammar.panels: 0-2 stage surfaces, preferably transparent/dim; panels must not compete with the hero object.
componentGrammar.cards: Avoid repeated cards. Use product reveal zones, capability strips, or proof ledgers.
componentGrammar.icons: Minimal line icons only when they support a feature.

shapeGrammar.shadow: optical glow, not card drop shadows

typeLock.title: Segoe UI Variable/Segoe UI, large light-to-semibold sans
forbidden: condensed poster type unless style says so

layoutGrammar.safeZones: Hero product or claim owns first viewport; secondary panels stay outside title safe area.

gridDiscipline.overlay: optional; use for editorial/keynote hybrids
gridDiscipline.placement: stage or poster composition can override grid when layout id and safe zones are explicit

graphicGrammar.diagram: Use one visual focus at a time.

cinematic-keynote.motionGrammar: Fade, mask, focus pull, slow light sweep; no bounce or UI jiggle.

componentGrammar.numbering: Large grid-aligned mono numbers or rectangular cells. No circular badges.
componentGrammar.panels: Ink/accent/fill/outline card roles only; never mix fill and outline without role.
componentGrammar.cards: Use registered Swiss cells, bands, split statements, ledgers, and matrices.
componentGrammar.callouts: Use hairlines and square signal marks.
componentGrammar.icons: Lucide line icons or square marks; no hand-drawn icons.

typeLock.title: Arial/Helvetica/Segoe UI/Microsoft YaHei, weight ladder: bigger is lighter

layoutGrammar.safeZones: Top titles left-aligned unless statement layout; every slide needs layout id.

gridDiscipline.overlay: same-box debug overlay recommended; G toggle when practical
gridDiscipline.placement: major regions align to column starts/ends; text rhythm follows baseline multiples

graphicGrammar.diagram: SVG geometry only; labels in HTML.

swiss-grid-signal.motionGrammar: Mask and block wipes aligned to grid; one semantic recipe per slide.

componentGrammar.numbering: Margin folios, page tabs, serif numerals; no app-style chips.
componentGrammar.panels: Paper panels, margin notes, quoted passages, image captions.
componentGrammar.cards: Use as editorial fragments, not dashboard cards.
componentGrammar.badges: Small imprint labels or chapter markers.
componentGrammar.callouts: Pull quotes, side notes, source captions.
componentGrammar.icons: Rare; prefer typographic rules and image crops.

typeLock.title: Windows-safe serif or serif-like CJK stack when approved by style
forbidden: all-caps tech labels as dominant voice

layoutGrammar.safeZones: Avoid title collisions with floated sidebars; image captions stay within grid.

gridDiscipline.overlay: same-box debug overlay recommended; G toggle when practical
gridDiscipline.placement: major regions align to column starts/ends; text rhythm follows baseline multiples

graphicGrammar.diagram: Editorial annotations, source labels, gentle rules.

editorial-paper.motionGrammar: Paper drift, image fade, underline draw; no mechanical snap unless profile overrides.

componentGrammar.numbering: Rectangular rail tabs, engraved index strips, mono counters. No circular process numbers.
componentGrammar.panels: Graphite panels are instrument panels only, max one per slide, and must use data-component-role="instrument-panel".
componentGrammar.cards: Use calibrated modules with top rules, switch rows, ledger rows, or scale cells. No generic rounded cards.
componentGrammar.badges: Rectangular mono tabs; no pills, no circular badges.
componentGrammar.callouts: Mechanical labels, tick marks, warning strips, ruler annotations.
componentGrammar.icons: Industrial line icons, switches, sliders, calibration marks; no playful icons.

shapeGrammar.shadow: none or very shallow matte shadow

typeLock.title: Segoe UI/Aptos/Microsoft YaHei UI sans, medium or semibold, 48-86px

layoutGrammar.safeZones: Right-side instrument panels cannot overlap title safe area; cover title max width must account for panel width.

gridDiscipline.overlay: same-box overlay or equivalent debug hook when layout is grid-led
gridDiscipline.placement: major title/content/diagram bands declare grid spans; exceptions require component role

graphicGrammar.diagram: Use orthogonal modules, tick marks, switches, scales; avoid generic SaaS dashboards.

industrial-control.motionGrammar: Mechanical snap/fade, bar calibration, switch lock-in, gauge sweep under 400ms; no bounce.

componentGrammar.numbering: Terminal row ids, grid coordinates, ledger counters.
componentGrammar.panels: Terminal panes with explicit data/source role; no decorative black boxes.
componentGrammar.cards: Use rows, tables, log panels, ticker strips.
componentGrammar.badges: Ticker labels and status chips with rectangular geometry.

typeLock.title: Sharp sans or mono-assisted display
typeLock.body: sans/mono mix with strong numeric legibility

layoutGrammar.safeZones: Maintain table readability; no more than 7 columns unless split.

gridDiscipline.overlay: same-box overlay or equivalent debug hook when layout is grid-led
gridDiscipline.placement: major title/content/diagram bands declare grid spans; exceptions require component role

graphicGrammar.diagram: Data-first; every mark should have a value or state.

data-terminal.motionGrammar: Scanline, count-up, row reveal; B mode freezes.

componentGrammar.numbering: Course path tabs, rectangular step labels, margin lesson ids.
componentGrammar.panels: Warm institutional cards, proof blocks, outcome stats, teacher notes.
componentGrammar.cards: Use program cards, evidence cards, curriculum steps; no childish sticker cards.
componentGrammar.badges: Small course/category labels, not playful pills unless template allows.
componentGrammar.callouts: Parent-facing trust notes, evidence checklists, outcome captions.
componentGrammar.icons: Thin educational line icons or none.

typeLock.title: Stable serif/sans pairing with Windows-safe CJK fallback
typeLock.mono: only for small labels or course codes

layoutGrammar.safeZones: Keep text hierarchy calm; avoid overfilling parent-facing slides.

gridDiscipline.overlay: same-box overlay or equivalent debug hook when layout is grid-led
gridDiscipline.placement: major title/content/diagram bands declare grid spans; exceptions require component role

graphicGrammar.diagram: Use learning paths, evidence chains, curriculum ladders.

education-institutional.motionGrammar: Paper light, checklist reveal, path draw; no flashy launch animation.

componentGrammar.numbering: Section folios, syllabus ids, margin tabs.
componentGrammar.panels: Parchment/ivory evidence panels, curriculum ledgers, assessment matrices.
componentGrammar.cards: Formal cards with strong headings and restrained accents.
componentGrammar.callouts: Citation notes, assessment evidence, can-do statements.
componentGrammar.icons: Use only if functional; avoid heraldic decoration.

layoutGrammar.safeZones: Do not imitate elite-school coat-of-arms layouts.

gridDiscipline.overlay: same-box debug overlay recommended; G toggle when practical
gridDiscipline.placement: major regions align to column starts/ends; text rhythm follows baseline multiples

graphicGrammar.diagram: Rubrics and evidence chains over decorative badges.

academic-institutional.motionGrammar: Subtle paper movement, rule draw, checklist sequence.

componentGrammar.numbering: Rectangular lab ids, protocol steps, not circles.
componentGrammar.panels: White/blue lab surfaces, model cards, evaluation tables.
componentGrammar.cards: Use exact module cards with protocol labels; no generic SaaS blue-white soup.
componentGrammar.callouts: Model assumptions, eval notes, dataset warnings.
componentGrammar.icons: Thin technical icons, model nodes, arrows.

layoutGrammar.safeZones: Keep diagrams readable; one pipeline per slide.

gridDiscipline.overlay: same-box overlay or equivalent debug hook when layout is grid-led
gridDiscipline.placement: major title/content/diagram bands declare grid spans; exceptions require component role

graphicGrammar.diagram: Model/data/output/eval flow with labeled nodes.

clean-room-ai.motionGrammar: Clean grid drift, node reveal, matrix scan; B freezes.

componentGrammar.numbering: Coordinates, evidence ids, source rows.
componentGrammar.panels: Evidence cells, ledgers, source notes, risk markers.
componentGrammar.cards: Only evidence/report cells with source roles; no marketing cards.
componentGrammar.badges: Rectangular source tags and confidence labels.
componentGrammar.callouts: Evidence interpretation separated from raw facts.

typeLock.title: Manrope/Inter/Segoe UI, light numerals and exact labels
typeLock.mono: required for coordinates and source ids

layoutGrammar.safeZones: Every claim needs a visual/source role; do not hide caveats.

gridDiscipline.overlay: same-box debug overlay recommended; G toggle when practical
gridDiscipline.placement: major regions align to column starts/ends; text rhythm follows baseline multiples

graphicGrammar.diagram: Separate evidence, interpretation, and recommendation.

proof-dossier.motionGrammar: Coordinate scan, row reveal, source lock-in.

componentGrammar.numbering: PCB coordinates, part ids, engineering tabs.
componentGrammar.panels: Blueprint traces, module panels, spec tables.
componentGrammar.cards: Hardware modules, not app cards.

shapeGrammar.shadow: none or glow tied to signal

layoutGrammar.safeZones: Signal traces cannot obscure text.

gridDiscipline.overlay: same-box overlay or equivalent debug hook when layout is grid-led
gridDiscipline.placement: major title/content/diagram bands declare grid spans; exceptions require component role

graphicGrammar.diagram: Traces must map real logical flow.

hardware-blueprint.motionGrammar: Signal pulse along selected traces; low frequency.

componentGrammar.numbering: Telemetry channel ids, rectangular lap/phase labels.
componentGrammar.panels: Metric dashboards only when they have real evaluation roles.
componentGrammar.cards: Use telemetry strips, scenario comparisons, launch effect ledgers.
componentGrammar.badges: Rectangular signal labels; no racing stickers.
componentGrammar.icons: Vehicle/system line icons only if needed.

shapeGrammar.shadow: none; glow only for signal path

typeLock.title: Fast precise sans, medium weight
forbidden: luxury serif unless style specifically changed

layoutGrammar.safeZones: Do not let dashboard panels cover the main claim.

gridDiscipline.overlay: same-box overlay or equivalent debug hook when layout is grid-led
gridDiscipline.placement: major title/content/diagram bands declare grid spans; exceptions require component role

graphicGrammar.diagram: Signals should map to cognition, memory, leads, narrative, and brand asset.

componentGrammar.numbering: Small gallery labels and wall-text ids.
componentGrammar.panels: Mostly unframed whitespace; cards only as catalog entries.
componentGrammar.cards: Sparse, not dashboard-like.

typeLock.title: curated serif or severe sans, restrained weight

layoutGrammar.safeZones: Whitespace is structural; do not fill every area.

gridDiscipline.overlay: same-box debug overlay recommended; G toggle when practical
gridDiscipline.placement: major regions align to column starts/ends; text rhythm follows baseline multiples

graphicGrammar.diagram: Use negative space and captions.

componentGrammar.panels: Chunky blocks with high contrast; no polished SaaS cards.
componentGrammar.cards: Poster blocks, zine strips, workshop prompts.
componentGrammar.badges: Rectangular loud labels; circles only if part of Memphis profile.

shapeGrammar.shadow: hard offset only if profile demands

layoutGrammar.safeZones: Loud does not mean illegible; keep one dominant axis.

gridDiscipline.overlay: optional; use for editorial/keynote hybrids
gridDiscipline.placement: stage or poster composition can override grid when layout id and safe zones are explicit

graphicGrammar.diagram: Use bold shape hierarchy.

componentGrammar.numbering: Tiny section ids, margin tabs, table row numbers.
componentGrammar.panels: Plain research cards, notes, tables.
componentGrammar.cards: Few, quiet, content-first.

typeLock.title: plain Windows-safe sans/serif based on selected style

layoutGrammar.safeZones: Use whitespace; do not create empty bland SaaS pages.

componentGrammar.cards: Material cards with real content, not Pinterest mood boards.
